General.Name: Newlink Technology Inc
General.Description: Newlink Technology Inc., an investment holding company, provides big data analysis and artificial intelligence related solutions in the People's Republic of China. The company offers software development, and technical and maintenance services, as well as sells standard software products. It also provides robotic process automation (RPA) solutions, smart park solutions, medical and health care big data intelligent management solutions, deep semantic analysis, risk prevention and control, and solution services powered by technologies, such as language parsing, data mining and analysis, cloud-based computing, distributed database management, intelligent control, knowledge graph, and deep learning. In addition, the company's solutions include medical quality control and safety warning platforms; and intelligent healthcare platform. It serves primarily finance, medical, transportation, and logistics, as well as general industries. Newlink Technology Inc. was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
General.Address: Xueqing Jiachuang Building, Tower A, Beijing, China, 100083
